command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '=UNTRACKED_RUNTIME='
ls -la runtime/
echo '=UNTRACKED_TESTS='
ls -la tests/
echo '=UNTRACKED_DOCS='
ls docs/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=OPERATOR_JOB='
ls memory/operator/active/ 2>/dev/null || echo NO_ACTIVE
ls memory/operator/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=PHASE_CTRL='
ls memory/phase-controller/ 2>/dev/null
ls memory/phase-advancement/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=EXEC_PIPELINE='
ls memory/execution-pipeline/ 2>/dev/null
ls memory/execution-pipeline/governed/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=CANONICAL_JOB='
find memory/ -name *.json 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l phase9e10|9e10|9E10|9E.10|9e.10 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=RUNTIME_FILES='
cat runtime/operator_runtime.py | head -60
ENDSSH
